---
name: Repository work item
about: Report a problem or propose a bounded repository improvement
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or outcome

Describe the observed problem or the concrete outcome needed. Include evidence rather than only a proposed implementation.

## Scope

- Affected user or operator:
- Affected app, module, host, or documentation area:
- Known constraints and out-of-scope work:

## Current and expected behavior

Explain what happens now and what should happen instead. Include reproduction steps, logs, or examples when applicable.

## Architecture and decisions

Link relevant ADRs, architecture docs, standards, or context packs. Identify any new decision that must be made before implementation.

## Acceptance evidence

List observable acceptance conditions and the tests or checks that should prove them.
